# ScrapeGoat

> ScrapeGoat is an MCP server that indexes documentation for AI coding
> assistants. It fetches official docs from websites, GitHub, npm, and PyPI,
> stores them in PostgreSQL with pgvector embeddings, and serves them via
> HTTP/SSE/Streamable MCP endpoints. Deployed via git clone + docker compose,
> containers are built locally. No images are published to any registry.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/README.md):
  Full project overview, quick start, configuration, deployment, and AI tool
  connection guide
- [Architecture](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/codemap.md):
  Repository atlas with system entry points, directory map, and architecture
  diagram
- [nginx reverse proxy config](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/docs/infrastructure/nginx-reverse-proxy.conf):
  Production nginx config with HTTP→HTTPS redirect, SSE streaming, and 1 GB
  upload support

## Source

- [AppServer](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/app/codemap.md):
  Fastify server with modular MCP, tRPC, web, and worker service composition
- [MCP server](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/mcp/codemap.md):
  Tool registration, stdio/SSE/HTTP transports, resource handlers
- [Store](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/store/codemap.md):
  PostgreSQL document store with pgvector embeddings, hybrid search (RRF), and
  schema migrations
- [Pipeline](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/pipeline/codemap.md):
  Job queue, worker pool, tRPC-backed remote pipeline with recovery
- [Scraper](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/scraper/codemap.md):
  Strategy-based scraping engine: web, GitHub, local files, npm, PyPI strategies
  with content processing middleware chains
- [Splitter](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/splitter/codemap.md):
  Semantic document chunking: markdown, JSON, text splitters with tree-sitter AST
  source code splitting
- [CLI](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/cli/codemap.md):
  Yargs-based command dispatch and service lifecycle management
- [Web UI](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/web/codemap.md):
  AlpineJS + htmx dashboard with SSE event streaming and Tailwind CSS

## Config

- [.env.example](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/.env.example):
  All environment variables with defaults and descriptions
- [docker-compose.postgres.yml](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/docker-compose.postgres.yml):
  Recommended deployment (PostgreSQL + worker + MCP + web)
- [docker-compose.yml](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/docker-compose.yml):
  Standalone deployment (external PostgreSQL required)

## Optional

- [Embedding factory](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/store/embeddings/codemap.md):
  Provider configuration for OpenAI, Google Vertex/Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Azure
- [Telemetry](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/telemetry/codemap.md):
  PostHog analytics with PII sanitization and opt-out support
- [Auth](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/auth/codemap.md):
  OAuth2/OIDC proxy authentication middleware for MCP endpoints
- [Upload](https://github.com/midnightphreaker/scrapegoat/src/branch/main/src/upload/codemap.md):
  File upload pipeline: archive extraction, import tree builder, security
  validation
